_note: T44 CI smoke fixture — mocked judge scores within1 but not exact (diff 1 all dims), see eval-smoke/smoke.test.ts

decision.title: Switch on-call rotation from weekly to bi-weekly
decision.context: On-call burnout complaints have been rising for two quarters running.
decision.rationale: Bi-weekly halves exposure per engineer at the cost of longer individual shifts.

forecasts.question: Burnout complaints drop within one quarter

outcome.summary: Complaints dropped noticeably; no other side effects noted.

score_rationales.risk_comprehensiveness: Only the obvious burnout angle considered, no coverage-gap risk: 2.
score_rationales.calibration_given_knowable: 0.6 is plausible but not strongly justified: 3.
score_rationales.process_quality: Three options, explicit tradeoff, contractor option properly costed out: 5.
